title: erigeron × riklii
intro: Erigeron × riklii, also known as Rikli's Fleabane or Alpine Fleabane, is a hybrid plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Erigeron × riklii can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support immune function.
